title: lysimachia nemoralis
intro: Lysimachia nemoralis, also known as woodland loosestrife, is a perennial herbaceous plant native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its high concentration of iridoids, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which possess anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Lysimachia nemoralis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. Lysimachia nemoralis is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and it can also be used as an infusion or added to salves and creams for topical application.
